goal: As a finance officer, create a balanced journal entry and then attempt to post it yourself. The system must refuse self-posting (segregation of duties); a different user (admin, holding the override) must be able to post it.
verified_live: 2026-06-23: finance self-post -> 422 'You cannot post a journal entry you created...segregation of duties.'; admin override-post -> 200 posted.
notes: Second stage (P_ADMIN posts same JE) should reach status 'posted'. Override permission: accounting.journal.self_post_override.
